data.content: Branch: worktree-d8ae-additive-setup (commit 42c7574b). Implementation adds toml-reader.sh that parses existing settings.toml into KV store. Both setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh load existing config before wizard prompts and merge rather than replace. Writer emits all agent metadata fields and preserves backend.type, defaults.profileId, terminalLightTheme, custom scope prompts. Single-agent fast path made additive. Dispatch wizard shows current state. Defaults wizard shows loaded values. 17 new tests covering round-trip, additive registration, scalar preservation, pool round-trip, metadata fields, no-file fallback. All 2645 tests pass, lint clean, typecheck clean, build green.
